title: Luffy’s Grief and the ASL Past: Rising Conflict
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Sabo, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #3, Dadan, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as the scene develops across pages 5–8.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Sabo, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #3, Dadan, Unknown person #6, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ACE... DID YOU COME BACK ALONE?

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Where the hell did you go!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Where are you going today, ace!!?

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Boss!! He's going after Ace again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey, Luffy!! You've got chores to do!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: On rainy days and windy days...

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: He pushed on, despite his injuries.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Ah... I'm out of the forest...

summary: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Sabo, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #3, Dadan, Unknown person #6, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: rising conflict.
